Menu.featuredDescription: Crafted with seasonal ingredients and modern culinary techniques.

Menu.emptyDescription: Try a broader search or relax one of the filters to see more of the menu.

RestaurantInfo.heading: A quieter kind of luxury.
RestaurantInfo.story: Luna Bistro is designed for slow evenings, polished plates, and the kind of hospitality that feels personal without asking for attention. Seasonal Mediterranean cooking meets a candlelit room, measured service, and a bar program built for lingering.
RestaurantInfo.quote: Our menu follows the season, but the mood stays constant: warm light, generous tables, and a little ceremony in every detail.

seo.title: Luna Menu — Premium Digital Menus for Restaurants
seo.description: Luna Menu creates premium, mobile-first QR menu pages for restaurants, cafes, cocktail bars, wine bars, boutique hotels, and hospitality brands.

hero.eyebrow: Premium QR menus for hospitality brands
hero.headline: Digital menus with the feeling of a beautifully hosted evening.
hero.description: Luna Menu turns every restaurant menu into a fast, elegant, mobile-first public page that carries the atmosphere of the brand from the first scan.

problemSolution.heading: PDF, image, and printed menus make guests work too hard.
problemSolution.problemTitle: Old menus feel slow, static, and off-brand
problemSolution.problemDescription: Guests pinch, zoom, wait for large files, or browse a menu that no longer matches the table, the season, or the room.
problemSolution.solutionTitle: Luna Menu is built for the first scan
problemSolution.solutionDescription: A restaurant gets a polished public URL, a theme that fits its identity, localized content, fast browsing, search, filters, and CMS-backed updates.

features.heading: Everything the public menu needs, without dashboard clutter.

items.title: Mobile-first menu
items.description: Designed for guests holding a phone at the table, with readable sections, large tap targets, and calm browsing.

items.title: Restaurant branding
items.description: Logo, cover imagery, color mood, typography, and hospitality details stay centered in the experience.

items.title: Turkish and English support
items.description: Localized public pages keep UI labels and restaurant content cleanly separated.

items.title: QR-ready public URL
items.description: Each restaurant has a stable localized menu address that can be printed on QR materials.

items.title: Featured items
items.description: Highlight seasonal plates, signature drinks, chef selections, or high-margin guest favorites.

items.title: Search and filters
items.description: Guests can quickly find dishes, drinks, notes, vegetarian options, and spicy items.

items.title: Fast loading
items.description: Server-rendered pages, optimized images, and restrained interaction keep the experience light.

items.title: SEO-friendly pages
items.description: Localized metadata, canonical URLs, hreflang alternates, and structured data support discoverability.

items.title: Easy CMS updates
items.description: Menu content lives in Sanity, so restaurants can keep names, prices, availability, and highlights current.

themes.heading: Three visual directions, one shared menu system.

items.name: Luna
items.description: Dark, cinematic, and polished for restaurants, cocktail bars, and evening-led hospitality.

items.name: Artisan
items.description: Warm, editorial, and crafted for cafes, bakeries, bistros, and ingredient-led brands.

items.name: Street Food
items.description: Bright, direct, and energetic for casual menus that still need a strong branded presence.

demos.heading: Open the sample menu in either language.
demos.description: These links are safe public examples. If a demo restaurant is not currently published, the homepage still renders normally.

howItWorks.heading: From menu content to table-ready QR in five clear steps.

steps.title: Create restaurant menu
steps.description: Add categories, items, prices, availability, images, and restaurant details.

steps.title: Customize theme
steps.description: Choose a visual direction that matches the restaurant's mood and brand.

steps.title: Publish public URL
steps.description: Launch a localized page guests can open directly from any modern phone.

steps.title: Generate QR code
steps.description: Place the menu URL on printed QR material for tables, rooms, counters, or bars.

steps.title: Guests scan and browse
steps.description: Guests move through the menu quickly, search, filter, and discover featured items.

faq.heading: The practical questions restaurant owners ask first.

items.question: Can prices be updated?
items.answer: Yes. Menu content is managed through the CMS, so prices, item names, availability, and highlights can be updated without replacing a printed file.

items.question: Does it support Turkish and English?
items.answer: Yes. The MVP supports Turkish and English localized public menu pages.

items.question: Can the menu match the restaurant brand?
items.answer: Yes. Each restaurant can use its own branding assets and select an approved theme direction.

items.question: Can I use QR codes?
items.answer: Yes. Every restaurant menu has a public URL that can be used for QR code materials.

items.question: Is it mobile-friendly?
items.answer: Yes. Luna Menu is designed mobile-first for guests browsing at the table.

finalCta.eyebrow: Ready for a quieter menu experience
finalCta.heading: Give guests a menu that feels as considered as the room.
finalCta.description: Request a demo or open the live sample to see how Luna Menu presents a restaurant on mobile.
